race.comment: MEDDLESOME (4) doesn't win out of turn but rarely finishes far away. Drops back to a winning trip on a short turnaround and keeps Looker. Leading player. THINK BACK (9) has shown good early muster since resuming this campaign and finally got the job done last start at Muswellbrook when leading all the way. Will look to do the same. CASINO COLLECTION (7) made very light work of her maiden two back at Taree when storming home to win with plenty in hand. Went close to making it two on the bounce last start at a price. A mare in form is always hard to stop. IT'S A WRITTEN (10) hasn't done much wrong of late and keeps Roper. Worth keeping safe.
